title: Add lint error when connecting real to an AND gate
body:
Compilation of the following module results in an error: `%Error: Expected integral (non-'real') input to AND`
```SystemVerilog
module a(input real i1);
    and gate(o2, i1, i2);
endmodule: a
```

Options: `--cc --exe testbench.cpp --timing -Wno-fatal +1800-2023ext+sv`

### Expected Behavior
SystemVerilog allows truncation and implicit casting of `real` to integral types, so this module should either compile successfully or explicitly report that implicit casting of `real` is unsupported.

This issue occurs in `Verilator 5.030 2024-10-27 rev v5.030-45-g2cb1a8de7`

Found by a [verilog model](https://github.com/DepTyCheck/verilog-model) using [deptycheck](https://github.com/buzden/deptycheck)
